---
id: list-1
title: "List risk limits"
description: "Returns limits for a specific book when bookId is supplied, or all limits across every book when omitted."
sidebar_label: "List risk limits"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List risk limits"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/risk-limits"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns limits for a specific book when bookId is supplied, or all limits across every book when omitted.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
